creator: c0rn@o2.pl
text:
Tarballs have been recreated and due some glitch (other version of gzip or arch?) file size is couple of bytes bigger. After contacting developers and checking contents of "new" and "old" tarballs (no differences) I`m confident we can refresh those checksums.

Build error logs:

http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/a.7.2008022809/claws-mail-att_remover-1.0.7_4.log
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/a.7.2008022809/claws-mail-cachesaver-0.10.6_4.log
http://pointyhat.freebsd.org/errorlogs/i386-errorlogs/a.7.2008022809/claws-mail-newmail-0.0.11_3.log
